overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking and running through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character travels along elevated sidewalks, crosses multi-lane streets, and passes towering digital billboards and industrial structures while sparse traffic and occasional pedestrians populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk beside illuminated retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk with an illuminated concrete wall on the right and multi-lane road on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: concrete wall with horizontal yellow neon strip lighting along the top edge
futuristic skyscrapers with glowing neon advertisements and window lights
large elevated highway ramp with support pillars silhouetted against the night sky
tall modern street lamp with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated concrete sidewalk next to a glowing retaining wall. The neon-lit skyline of the futuristic city rises in the background with elevated highways visible in the distance. Sparse traffic passes on the multi-lane road to the left.

events.description: character turns 180 degrees to cross the multi-lane road
character transitions from walking to running along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turns around, crosses the street while checking for traffic, then begins running along the opposite side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying a red-orange advertisement with a human figure
asphalt road with lane markings and passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character turns and crosses the multi-lane street, transitioning from walking to running. A large vertical digital billboard becomes visible in the distance while the illuminated wall falls behind. Another pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with digital signage

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to allow a black sedan to pass

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk approaching a busy intersection with a large digital billboard dominating the left side

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopping at the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
building facade covered in multicolored neon lights and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the sidewalk toward a major intersection. The large digital billboard grows larger on the left while traffic increases. The character stops briefly at a crosswalk to let a black sedan pass before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with industrial warehouse buildings

events.description: character slows from running to walking while entering the plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past the large billboard toward an industrial building with warning signage

entered.detail: low industrial warehouse building with yellow and red warning signs reading DANGER ELECTRIC
metal fence running along the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character slows to a walking pace while moving through an open paved plaza. Passing the large billboard on the left, the character approaches an industrial building with prominent danger signs. Sparse bushes and a chain-link fence line the right side of the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a quiet elevated walkway to a bustling industrial plaza. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a glowing retaining wall, with the city skyline and distant highways looming in the background. As the character turns to cross a multi-lane street, the pace shifts from a walk to a run, leaving the illuminated wall behind while a massive vertical digital billboard emerges in the distance. The scene then opens up toward a major intersection where traffic increases and the character briefly pauses at a crosswalk for a passing black sedan. Finally, the character slows to a walk through an open paved plaza, passing the towering billboard on the left before approaching an industrial building marked with danger signs and bordered by a chain-link fence.
